title: RoleAssignment
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 8.4 (fields unchanged) / 19b.1 (PACK-05 physical ownership, ADR-016). Owned by governance-service (epd2_governance_service.domain.RoleAssignment). role_code remains an open string at canon level - the closed 8-value pilot taxonomy (ADR-020, section 5: governance_policy_proposer, governance_policy_approver, governance_reviewer, technical_challenge_reviewer, ballot_invalidation_proposer, ballot_invalidation_approver, oversight_reviewer, observer) is enforced only at the application layer, never here. Status pending -> active -> suspended/expired/revoked (or pending -> revoked directly).
